case_title: TURGAY DURAK VS. SAMANTHA TERESA DURAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY TURKISH INTERPRETER--- BARAN YAMAN. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHELLEY CRUZ--AAA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURAK, TURGAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DURAN, SAMANTHA TERESA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
